mapper.insert: insert into device.device_install_app_minute_all select #{endTime} as log_time,did_type,did, arrayStringConcat(groupUniqArray(trust_install_app_ids), ',') AS trust_install_app_ids, arrayStringConcat(groupUniqArray(default_install_app_ids), ',') AS default_install_app_ids from ( WITH left(ad_id, 5) AS media_id SELECT media_id,did_type,did, if(media_id IN (${trustInstallAppMediaIds}), install_app_ids, NULL) AS trust_install_app_ids, if(media_id NOT IN (${trustInstallAppMediaIds}), install_app_ids, NULL) AS default_install_app_ids FROM `default`.${tableName} rla WHERE log_time >=#{startTime} AND log_time <= #{endTime} AND trust_type = 0 AND install_app_ids != '' AND did_type != 0 LIMIT 1 BY media_id, did_type, did ) group by did_type,did
